subcodes.first_line: O thou distinguished branch of the blessed and sacred Lote-Tree! When the Ancient Beauty, the Most Great Name—may my life be offered up for His loved ones—would visit Haifa
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع جلیل سدره مقدسه مبارکه جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه الفدا در وقتیکه
subcodes.subjects: @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @Shrines and Holy places, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
